framework: A path qualifies only when >=3 prominent, proven people in the field visibly share the capability, each with a resolving link — the pattern across standouts is the evidence, not market demand. Ranked by strength of that pattern. Curated editorial, not DOL-derived.

paths.what_it_is: Turn a real plant incident into a rigorous, publicly taught case study that explains root cause, not just what broke.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves you can extract a transferable lesson from a failure and teach it well enough that other plants change how they operate.

paths.path: Public technical teaching of process fundamentals
paths.what_it_is: Distill a core chemical engineering concept into a free screencast, video, or course used by students and practitioners.
paths.why_it_signals: Explaining a hard technical concept clearly enough for independent learners to actually get it is a much higher bar than passing a class in it.

paths.path: Building process optimization software adopted industry-wide
paths.what_it_is: Develop and publish a numerical solver or modeling framework for process design and optimization that becomes a standard tool across the field.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves you can turn a mathematical method into working software robust enough that other engineers build their own work on top of it.
